baseline.note: no legacy ledger â accounting started clean; absorbed 4 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade â learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With 53 settled trades, confirmed positive EV edges exist in trending/Hurst regimes, normal BB state (n=16, WR 0.875), 120-240s TTC (n=26, WR 0.731), bearish MTF alignment (n=12, WR 0.833), sell-pressure CVD (n=19, WR 0.737), and strong ADX/zscore -2..-1 buckets, all showing positive pnl and WR well above breakeven after costs. Most other buckets are either n<8 noise or show negative pnl (e.g., >=240s TTC, active volume). Overall sample remains small and selective (only 53 accepts from 36k rejects), so patterns are still early-stage.
warnings: ignore all n<8 buckets; overall n=53 still low for robust calibration; observe-only so no live risk; many buckets correlated
focus_next: accumulate samples in normal BB + bearish MTF + sell CVD + strong ADX intersections
monitor if normal BB edge persists beyond n=20

history.summary: With only 53 settled trades the sample remains small but already shows confirmed positive EV (overall wr 0.604, avg_ev 0.116) concentrated in a handful of buckets that comfortably exceed n=8 and breakeven. DOWN_STRONG, trending/Hurst, normal BB state, dead volume, strong ADX, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD and 120-240 s TTC all display win-rates 0.64-0.83 with solidly positive realized pnl and EV after cost; most other slices are still too thin or mixed to trust.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, dead volume, strong ADX, bearish-aligned MTF, and sell-pressure CVD show confirmed positive EV and win-rates above breakeven (n>=8). UP signals, >=240s TTC, active volume, and mixed MTF remain unprofitable or negative EV. Sample still small overall; many buckets ignored due to n<8.
changes_since_last: sample increased to 53 trades; DOWN_STRONG and 120-240s TTC now meet confirmation thresholds

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (n=50), normal BB state (n=16), 120-240s TTC (n=26), bearish-aligned MTF (n=12), and sell-pressure CVD (n=19) show confirmed positive EV after costs and win-rates above breakeven with n>=8. UP signals and >=240s TTC remain marginal or negative on realized PnL despite positive avg EV. All other buckets are either n<8 or lack consistent edge.
changes_since_last: First analysis; sample now at 53 trades with DOWN bias and normal-BB edge emerging

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, confirmed positive EV edges exist in DOWN_STRONG signals (n=26, wr=0.692), trending regimes (n=50), 120-240s TTC (n=26, wr=0.731), normal BB state (n=16, wr=0.875), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12, wr=0.833), and sell-pressure CVD (n=19), all with n>=8, positive pnl, and EV>0.10 after costs. UP direction and >=240s holds show negative realized pnl despite some EV estimates. Sample remains small overall; many buckets ignored due to n<8.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.69, +15.5 pnl) while UP signals remain marginal or negative; normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish MTF alignment, and sell-pressure CVD buckets also clear breakeven with n>=8 and positive realized pnl. Total book is barely positive (+1.35) and heavily skewed to a few strong sub-cohorts, indicating early selectivity edge but still low power overall.

With n=53 total settled trades, DOWN_STRONG (n=26, wr=0.692, ev=0.136), trending regime (n=50), zscore -1..1 and -2..-1, 120-240s ttc (n=26), BB normal (n=16), dead volume (n=19), strong ADX (n=31), bearish supertrend, bear candle pressure (n=26), range middle/bottom, bearish MTF aligned (n=12), and CVD sell pressure (n=19) show confirmed positive EV after costs with wr above breakeven and n>=8. UP direction, long ttc >=240s, active volume, and mixed MTF remain unprofitable or noisy. Sample still small overall; no prior analysis available.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.69, ev 0.136) while UP signals remain marginal; normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, strong ADX, bearish MTF alignment, and CVD sell pressure buckets with n>=8 deliver the clearest edges above breakeven after costs.
changes_since_last: First analysis; sample now 53 with DOWN bias and normal BB state emerging as strongest

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, confirmed positive EV edges exist in trending/Hurst regimes, normal BB state (n=16, WR 0.875), 120-240s TTC (n=26, WR 0.731), bearish MTF alignment (n=12, WR 0.833), sell-pressure CVD (n=19, WR 0.737), and strong ADX/zscore -2..-1 buckets, all showing positive pnl and WR well above breakeven after costs. Most other buckets are either n<8 noise or show negative pnl (e.g., >=240s TTC, active volume). Overall sample remains small and selective (only 53 accepts from 36k rejects), so patterns are still early-stage.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only â never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only â never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

tradingview.stop_condition: ingest only â never trade authority

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated nested_implication violations.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective â never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview_latest_signal.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v6 ProfitGate

BTCUSD.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v6 ProfitGate

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only â they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades â never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

market_context.title: Bitcoin Up or Down - June 27, 7:30PM-7:45PM ET

tv_confidence_tier.note: TV confidence tier modulates min_edge/max_price only; never forces or blocks.

key_risks: large poly UP premium may persist
grok_decision.rationale: MTF confirmed down + fair 0.50 vs poly yes 0.575 creates cheap down at 0.43 ask; breakeven cleared and 15m series favors down side
